genre_archetype: castaway colony builder with direct exploration and survivor job assignment
camera_perspective: top-down island exploration with camp simulation overlays
control_model: virtual joystick movement, contextual action button, tap assignment, drag placement building
core_loop_signature: explore island sectors, gather survival resources, rescue stranded survivors, assign work roles, expand camp systems, endure night threats, unlock beacon objective
differentiation_axes: persistent single-island colony instead of stage-based combat maps
survivor labor assignment is the main strategic layer
day exploration transitions into night camp resolution
food, water, morale, and safety are balanced together
chapter progression is driven by colony infrastructure and rescues
forbidden_template_reuse: three-lane defense structures and wave-only maps
pure crop-grid management as the main loop
single-character endless survival without recruitable workers

map_content_budget.play_area_model: one persistent island with a central expandable beach camp and unlockable surrounding regions
map_content_budget.route_or_region_count: at least 8 named regions connected by shoreline paths, jungle routes, cliff passes, and reef access points
map_content_budget.interactive_regions: camp core, driftwood beach, freshwater grove, fishing coast, inland jungle, wreck site, cliff pass, beacon summit
map_content_budget.decorative_prop_count: at least 20 repeated scenic props across palms, tide pools, wreckage debris, rope markers, and camp clutter
map_content_budget.camera_or_scroll_model: player-centered camera with bounded scrolling over a persistent map

player_unit_types: tool-upgraded leader variants by equipment tier
boss_or_elite_types: storm alpha boar at cliff pass

special_rules: survivors only perform better when assigned to matching roles
night danger rises if fences, fire, or guards are neglected
storm forecasts telegraph future camp needs
risk_reward_systems: longer expeditions yield rare parts but increase return risk
rescuing survivors expands output but also raises food and shelter demand
pushing inland early unlocks stronger upgrades but raises injury chance

asset_variety_budget.animation_tier: medium for primary humanoids and key wildlife, light for structures and ambient props
asset_variety_budget.minimum_distinct_sprite_families: at least 8 distinct gameplay sprite families across leader, survivors, animals, resources, structures, landmarks, pickups, and effects
asset_variety_budget.asset_reuse_note: Do not solve the game with one generic farm pack or one zombie survival pack recolor; role coverage must reflect castaway colony work and island ecology.
